name: ROYAL STAY
address: Royal Sanctuary Road, Lake Pichola East Bay, Udaipur, Rajasthan, India
description: Welcome to ROYAL STAY. A landmark of imperial heritage and bespoke modern hospitality. Nestled along the tranquil waters of Lake Pichola, our resort provides a collection of palace suites, private wellness pavilions, and signature dining designed for the world's most discerning guests.

awards.title: Awwwards Site of the Year nominee
